violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The storage closets in the cafeteria area have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment to clean and sanitize areas where droppings are present. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway to the left of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
The gasket for milk chest #3 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The gaskets for the milk chest #1 and #2 were observed in poor repair. The hot water handle at the hand sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The presence of pest is not controlled as evidenced byd droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Droppings were found under equipment, and in the storage closet. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings(closet, behind equipment, cafeteria). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue with increased pest control, establishment is to continue monitor for activity. Establishment is to continue to clean any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. - Corrective Action - Droppings must be cleans from under all equipment, from along all walls, from mobile transport carts, and from the adjoining storage room. Establishment is to clean and sanitize and use proper cleaning methods. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. Establishment is to have pest control do a full evaluation of premises. Pest control is to be increased as needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The tile floor (tiles) in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings on the floor and under equipment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to send a copy of their next pest control inspection report to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The condensate from the two door refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2024

The floors in the kitchen and in the utility, closet has an accumulation of soil residue and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - Establishment is to work with facilities and with pest control. All droppings are to be removed from under equipment and from storage closet. Establishment is to request a full evaluation from pest control to determine points of entry. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The door to the outside, Door 11 is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings on the floor, the non food contact surfaces of the serving table, and in the storage closet adjoining the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Items from the table were removed. Serving trays were set aside to be wash rinsed and sanitized. Paper trays were used for todays lunch service. Establishment is to work with facilities and with pest control. All droppings are to be removed from under equipment and from storage closet. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The tile floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
